fagri-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Fagri In The Oven
instructions: We clear the phage from the scales and the instinctines. Alternatively, when you buy it, task to get it cleaned.
Wash it very well under running water and especially rinse the head and abdomen.
We leave it in a colander drawing very well.
Add salt within the Abdomen and head.
We're gringing on the outside.
Put the fennel clones in his belly.
In a small baking pan, add non-stick paper and place a grill on it.
With a piece of paper we oil the grill.
Lay on the lemon slides as a base
Preheat the evening to 200oC in the air.
Place the baking pan on the middle grill.
Bake for 35’.
With the air it's Baked all around, so it doesn't need to be filmed, at risk of disintegrating.

fajita-pasta-bake.name: Fajita Pasta Bake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a nonstick baking dish, add the bell peppers, mushrooms, and onion.
In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, paprika, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Pour the olive oil and half of the spice mix over the vegetables and toss well to coat.
Bake the vegetables for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender.
In a large pot of boiling water, cook the pasta according to the package instructions, until tender.
Drain the pasta, reserving about 1 cup (240 ml) of cooking water.
Return the drained pasta to the pot and add the roasted vegetables. Add the rest of the spice mix, the reserved pasta water, and the sour cream and mix to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to the baking dish used for roasting the vegetables and spread evenly. Sprinkle the cheese over the top.
Bake for about 15 minutes, until the cheese is golden brown.
Let cool for about 5 minutes, then serve. Garnish with parsley, if desired.
Enjoy!

family-latkes.name: Family Latkes
instructions: Place potatoes in salted water and let sit for about 15 minutes.
Grate potatoes on a medium or fine setting. Press out liquid; this should produce about 4 cups grated potato.
Place grated potato in a bowl and stir in flour, onion, salt, and pepper. Fold in eggs.
Preheat the oven to 121°C (120 degrees C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
Heat enough oil in a deep pan to reach 1/4 inch up the sides. Heat over medium-high heat until a drop of batter sizzles. Lower heat to medium.

Working in batches, drop batter into the hot oil in desired size and flatten into pancakes; brown on both sides, 5 to 7 minutes per side. Transfer to the prepared pans and keep warm in the preheated oven while you fry remaining batter.

farro-and-celery-salad.name: Farro And Celery Salad

ingredients.item: Sliced celery cut very thinly on a diagonal

instructions: Bring farro and 3 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan; season lightly with salt. Reduce heat to low and simmer until tender, 45–60 minutes. Drain and let cool slightly. Transfer to a medium bowl; add sliced celery and next 4 ingredients and toss. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.

feijoada-nordestino-northeastern-brazili.name: Feijoada Nordestino (northeastern Brazilian Black Bean Stew)

ingredients.prep: cut into fine ribbons, or to taste
cut in wedges, or as desired

instructions: Combine beans, onion, ham, calabresa, 3 cloves garlic, salt, cumin, black pepper, and bay leaf in a pressure cooker; cover with water to fill line.

Close cooker securely and place pressure regulator over vent according to manufacturer's instructions. Cook at high pressure until regulator is gently rocking, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce pressure to low. Cook, adding water halfway if needed, until beans are tender and water is reduced to your liking, about 1 hour.
Turn off heat. Let pressure release naturally according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock lid and remove. Let feijoada cool until ready to serve.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Saute remaining 1 clove garlic and collard greens until just tender, about 2 minutes.
Place cassava flour in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir until toasted, about 3 minutes. Stir in butter.
Serve feijoada with the collards-garlic mixture, toasted cassava flour, rice, orange wedges, and cilantro.

festive-red-cabbage-and-radicchio-salad.name: Festive Red Cabbage And Radicchio Salad

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: cored, any thick ribs removed, cut into  0.5"-thick strips

instructions: Using a small knife, cut away peel and white pith from 1 medium grapefruit, then 1 blood orange; discard. Slice each crosswise into ¼"-thick rounds; set aside. Cut 1 large lemon and remaining 1 blood orange in half and squeeze juice into a measuring glass or small bowl. Whisk ½ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. honey, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt into juice.

Place ½ small head of red cabbage, cored, any thick ribs removed, cut  into ½"-thick strips, in a large bowl; drizzle half of dressing over. Massage cabbage with your hands to coat and soften. Let sit at least 10 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Add 1 large head of radicchio, halved, cored, cut into 1½"-thick strips, ½ small red onion, thinly sliced, and reserved citrus to cabbage; drizzle in remaining dressing and toss to coat. Transfer salad to a platter and top with pomegranate seeds; season with freshly ground pepper.

filipino-coconut-garlic-fried-rice-sinan.name: Filipino Coconut Garlic Fried Rice (sinangag)
instructions: Place rice in a large bowl with enough water to cover by a few inches; swirl with your fingers, then drain. Repeat until water runs clear, about 3 times.

Combine rice, 1 ½ cups water, coconut cream, turmeric, and salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes. Chill, uncovered, 2 to 4 hours to overnight.

Heat coconut oil in a 12-inch skillet or wok over high heat. Add garlic; cook until it just begins to brown, about 1 minute. Add rice and spread in an even layer; cook, without stirring, until lightly browned and crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Add fish sauce; cook, stirring, until fully combined and heated through, about 2 minutes.

fish-patties-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Patties Recipe
instructions: Light a pot with water, margarine and a pinch of salt and let it boil. Add the flour in the form of rain, always stirring until a homogeneous dough becomes. Remove and reserve.

Peel and wash the onion, carrot and garlic, pinch the onion and garlic finely and grate the carrot. Bring to the fire a pot with water and salt, when boiling add the fish and let it cook. Remove and reserve. Heat the olive oil, add the onions and garlic, flour and milk in thread, always stirring. Remove, correct the seasonings and add the carrots and undone fish. Let it cook a little until the carrots are cooked, remove from the heat and season with lemon juice, chopped parsley, salt and pepper.

Extend the dough on a flour-sprinkled countertop, have some filling on top and fold. Cut in the form of rissol and repeat until the dough and filling are finished. Pass through the egg shakes and bread grated and let it fry in hot oil on both sides.

flourless-almond-cookies-with-cardamom-o.name: Flourless Almond Cookies With Cardamom, Orange Zest, And Pistachios

ingredients.item: Plus 1 teaspoon finely grated orange zest

instructions: Using an electric mixer on medium speed, cream sugar and oil in a large bowl until mixture resembles texture of wet sand, about 3 minutes. Add egg and orange zest and beat until just combined.
Whisk almond flour, potato starch, cardamom, and salt in a medium bowl. Fold dry ingredients into oil mixture. Cover with plastic wrap and chill 1 hour.

Spread pistachios in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet. Divide dough into 2 balls. Roll each ball into 1 1/2" wide logs, then roll logs in pistachios to coat; reserve remaining pistachios for decorating, if desired. Wrap logs in plastic wrap and chill at least 1 1/2 hours.

Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 177°C. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment. Using a sharp knife, slice dough into 1/4"-thick rounds and arrange on baking sheets (about 12 per sheet). Sprinkle with reserved pistachios, pressing lightly to adhere (alternatively, drizzle with melted chocolate after cookies are baked, see below).

Bake cookies, rotating sheets halfway through, until undersides are golden, 8–12 minutes. Transfer cookies to wire racks. Let 1 sheet cool completely before lining again with parchment and baking third batch.

If you didn't sprinkle the cookies with pistachios, melt chocolate in a medium heatproof bowl set over a medium pot of barely simmering water, stirring occasionally, or in short bursts in the microwave, stirring in between bursts, until chocolate is smooth. Drizzle cooled cookies with chocolate and let set before serving.
Dough can be formed into logs 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

flower-bake-recipe-lezzet.name: Flower Bake Recipe
instructions: 1. Take the juice from the kneading container, add instant yeast and sugar.
2. Active of Clans for 2–3 minutes.
3. Then make the mixture homogenous by adding eggs, salt and softened butter.
4. The way and knead a dough that is soft, lightweight.
5. By closing the car, listen to about 10–15 minutes.
6. Take the shredded dough into the lightly covered counter and middle thickness.
7. Drink give shape inner cut dough with the help of a glass.
8. In the edges of the dough that you cut, b&l; cu at equal intervals; addicts; leave the middle without cutting.
9. Create each piece light weightly.
10. If you wish, you can add cus with your finger;retail then jam or chocolate.
11. 11. Girl oil in a deep pan.
12. Leave the dough carefully to the oil and fry both sides to the golden yellow color area.
14 July You can capture the best consistency by serving while hot.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

fluffy-microwave-scrambled-eggs.name: Fluffy Microwave Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Break the eggs into a microwave-proof mixing bowl. Add milk and salt; mix well.
Pop the bowl into the microwave and cook on high power for 30 seconds. Remove bowl, beat eggs very well, scraping down the sides of the bowl, and return to the microwave for another 30 seconds.
Repeat this pattern, stirring every 30 seconds for up to 2 ½ minutes. Stop when eggs have the consistency you desire.
Serve warm and enjoy!

french-75-jell-o-shots.name: French 75 Jell-o Shots
instructions: Pour boiling water over lemon-flavored gelatin in a glass measuring cup; stir to combine. Stir in gin. Pour mixture into sixteen 2-ounce cups. Arrange cups in muffin tins, tilted to one side.
Refrigerate until set, about 4 hours.

Combine 1 1/4 cup sparkling wine and unflavored gelatin in a small pot. Let sit, about 3 minutes. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until gelatin is dissolved, 3 to 5 minutes. Add remaining 1/2 cup wine and food coloring; stir to combine.
Remove muffin tins from refrigerator. Set cups upright; pour wine mixture over lemon mixture.
Return to the refrigerator and chill until set, about 4 hours.

fresh-rosemary-chicken-thighs.name: Fresh Rosemary Chicken Thighs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine rosemary, lemon zest, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Rub over chicken thighs and place into a baking dish. Spray with cooking spray.

Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 35 to 40 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

fried-cuttlefish-with-tomato-rice-telecu.name: Fried Cuttlefish With Tomato Rice
fried-cuttlefish-with-tomato-rice-telecu.original_name: Choco frito com arroz de tomate
instructions: Wash the hatch, cut it into thick strips and season with salt. Beat the eggs and add the flour to them, until you get a thick pepper. In a high skillet, light some oil and oil and let it warm. Add the whole garlic tooth, peeled, and the blonde leaf.
Passe as tiras de choco pelo polme e depois por farinha. Deite-as na frigideira e deixe fritar. Retire com uma escumadeira quando estiverem douradas. Escorra-as sobre papel absorvente e reserve.

Prepare o arroz: descasque os alhos e a cebola e pique-os. Lave os tomates, retire-lhes a pele e as sementes e corte-os em cubos. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e a folha de louro. Junte a cebola e os alhos e deixe alourar.

Then add the tomato, the pulp, half the chopped parsley and salt and stir. Add the water and let it boil. Mix the rice and let it boil. Retrieve the seasonings and remove from the fire. Place the rice on a plate, have the choco around and decorate with lemon slices and the rest parsley. Serve right away.

fruit-and-broccoli-buffet-salad.name: Fruit And Broccoli Buffet Salad
instructions: Beat grapeseed oil, sugar, cider vinegar, lime juice, lime zest, garlic, salt, poppy seeds, paprika, and mustard together in a bowl with a whisk until smooth and creamy.
Heat a small skillet over medium heat. Toast pecans in hot skillet, stirring frequently, until fragrant, 4 to 5 minutes.; spread onto a cutting board to cool completely before chopping.
Toss orange sections, broccoli, apple, and grapes together in a bowl. Drizzle dressing over salad and toss gently to coat. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, 2 to 6 hours.
Sprinkle chopped pecans over salad.

fudgy-triple-chocolate-cookies.name: Fudgy Triple Chocolate Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat butter, white and brown sugars, shortening, fudge sauce, eggs, and vanilla together in a large bowl until light and fluffy.

Combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a bowl. Stir flour mixture into the butter mixture until well blended. Mix in the chocolate chips. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until just set (cookies will be very soft), 8 to 10 minutes. Cool slightly on the cookie sheets before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
